content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-browser/create-bucket/CreateBucketForm.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 153, 161
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 153):
  152              type={ButtonType.submit}
  153              variant={ButtonVariant.primary}
  154              data-test="obc-create"

  (line 161):
  160              type={ButtonType.button}
  161              variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
  162            >

```

### Fix 2
Line: 123
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-disabled-color-100' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100 pf-v5-u-mr-sm

Code context:
```
  122          {_.isEmpty(tagsData) && (
  123            <div className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100 pf-v5-u-mr-sm">
  124              {t('No tags are attached to this bucket.')}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 150, 158
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 150):
  149          <ActionGroup className="pf-v5-c-form">
  150            <Button
  151              id="create-s3-bucket-btn"

  (line 158):
  157            </Button>
  158            <Button
  159              onClick={() => navigate(-1)}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 123
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-disabled-color-100]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-disabled-color-100' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100 pf-v5-u-mr-sm

Code context:
```
  122          {_.isEmpty(tagsData) && (
  123            <div className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100 pf-v5-u-mr-sm">
  124              {t('No tags are attached to this bucket.')}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-browser/create-bucket/CreateBucketForm.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 153, 161): `Button.variant` type changed - added `'stateful'` to the union. The current values used are `ButtonVariant.primary` (line 153) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 161). Both `primary` and `secondary` are still valid values in the new type. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Line 123): CSS class `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` was removed. Looking at line 123, I see `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100 pf-v6-u-mr-sm` (it looks like `pf-v5-u-mr-sm` was already partially migrated to `pf-v6-u-mr-sm` in a previous pass). The `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` class has no v6 equivalent - it needs to be removed or replaced with custom CSS. I'll replace it with an inline style for the disabled color effect.

**Fix 3** (Lines 150, 158): Icon content in `<Button>` should move to the `icon` prop. Looking at lines 150-157 and 158-164, these buttons contain only text children (`{t('Create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), no icon elements. **No change needed** - there are no icons as children of these Button elements.

**Fix 4** (Line 123): Same as Fix 2 - `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` removed. Will be handled together with Fix 2.

Let me apply the changes:
Let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct with all applicable changes applied. Let me verify there are no unused imports or other artifacts:

- `cn` (classnames) is still used on line 118 ✓
- All PatternFly imports (`ActionGroup`, `Alert`, `AlertVariant`, `Button`, `ButtonType`, `ButtonVariant`, `Form`, `FormGroup`) are still used ✓
- No dead code introduced ✓

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (lines 153, 161)
**No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary`) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option, which doesn't affect existing usage.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` removed (line 123)
**Applied.** Removed the dead `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` class from the `className` and replaced its effect with an inline `style={{ color: 'var(--pf-t--global--color--disabled)' }}` using the PF6 design token for disabled color. The companion class `pf-v5-u-mr-sm` had already been migrated to `pf-v6-u-mr-sm` in a previous pass and was preserved.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>` (lines 150, 158)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children — they only contain text children (`{t('Create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), so the icon-to-prop migration does not apply.

### Fix 4 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` removed (line 123)
**Already addressed by Fix 2.** This is the same line and same class as Fix 2; handled together.

- `cn` (classnames) is still used on line 118 ✓
- All PatternFly imports (`ActionGroup`, `Alert`, `AlertVariant`, `Button`, `ButtonType`, `ButtonVariant`, `Form`, `FormGroup`) are still used ✓

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (lines 153, 161)
**No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary`) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option, which doesn't affect existing usage.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` removed (line 123)
**Applied.** Removed the dead `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` class from the `className` and replaced its effect with an inline `style={{ color: 'var(--pf-t--global--color--disabled)' }}` using the PF6 design token for disabled color. The companion class `pf-v5-u-mr-sm` had already been migrated to `pf-v6-u-mr-sm` in a previous pass and was preserved.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>` (lines 150, 158)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children — they only contain text children (`{t('Create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), so the icon-to-prop migration does not apply.

### Fix 4 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` removed (line 123)
